info.title: TxtSync API
info.description: TxtSync is an SMS messaging platform API that enables sending single and bulk SMS messages, managing contacts, tags, campaigns, numbers, media, links, and templates.

post.description: Create up to 25 contacts per request

get.summary: Get tags associated with a contact
Get contacts associated with a tag

put.summary: Update contact associations for a tag

post.summary: Add a voice message to a number

delete.summary: Delete a voice message from a number
